text: The echo of your metallic indifference jars against the quiet preparation of the empty lecture hall. I feel a prickle of anticipation—soon, voices will fill these chairs, ideas and questions sparking in the air. In the second space, surrounded by words and the hum of innovation, I am both energized and contemplative. The season of coconut soup—whatever its troubles—feels distant amidst all this purpose, yet I carry a restless curiosity, wondering how tradition stirs within these futuristic walls.
